title: Improvement notice issued to Derbyshire County Council: January 2025
body: "This improvement notice requires Derbyshire County Council to take steps to improve its special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) services.  It follows an Ofsted and Care Quality Commission area SEND report, which judged that there were:   6 areas for priority action 5 areas for improvement   "

taxons.title: Support for special educational needs and disability (SEND)
